prompts.footer:
IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember: Capturing USER INTENT is critical for VibeCoder support. Record why they want something, not just what they asked for. This context helps future sessions understand the bigger picture.

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write the observation data in English
prompts.xml_title_placeholder: [**title**: A short title capturing the core action or topic]
prompts.xml_fact_placeholder: [A concise, self-contained statement. Include user intent.]
prompts.xml_narrative_placeholder: [**narrative**: Full context: what was done, how it works, why it matters, what the user's goal is]
prompts.xml_summary_request_placeholder: [A short title capturing the essence of the user's request and what was discussed/executed]
prompts.xml_summary_investigated_placeholder: [What has been investigated so far? What was verified?]
prompts.xml_summary_learned_placeholder: [What was learned about how things work?]
prompts.xml_summary_completed_placeholder: [What work has been completed so far? What was shipped or changed?]
prompts.xml_summary_next_steps_placeholder: [What is actively being worked on or planned to be worked on next in this session?]
prompts.xml_summary_notes_placeholder: [Additional insights or observations about current progress]
prompts.continuation_instruction:
IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write the observation data in English
prompts.summary_footer:
IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write ALL summary content (request, investigated, learned, completed, next_steps, notes) in English
